title: Huehuetenango, HU — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Huehuetenango, HU: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Huehuetenango is a city in HU with a population of 120,000. A highland city near the Mexican border, known for its indigenous markets and ancient Maya ruins.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
